issue.author: dtcxzyw
issue.body:
Alive2: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/H7v8VG
```
define i1 @src(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 range(i32 0, -2147483648) %z) {
entry:
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %y, %x
  %cond = icmp sgt i32 %sub, %z
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cond)
  %ret = icmp slt i32 %x, %y
  ret i1 %ret
}

define i1 @tgt(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
entry:
  ret i1 true
}
```
See https://github.com/dtcxzyw/llvm-tools/issues/57
issue.title: [ConstraintElim] `Y -nsw X s> NonNeg` implies `Y s> X`

tests.current_optimized_program:
define i1 @test(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 range(i32 0, -2147483648) %z) {
entry:
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %y, %x
  %cond = icmp sgt i32 %sub, %z
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cond)
  %ret = icmp slt i32 %x, %y
  ret i1 %ret
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nosync nounwind willreturn memory(inaccessiblemem: write)
declare void @llvm.assume(i1 noundef) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nosync nounwind willreturn memory(inaccessiblemem: write) }
tests.source_program:
define i1 @test(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 range(i32 0, -2147483648) %z) {
entry:
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %y, %x
  %cond = icmp sgt i32 %sub, %z
  call void @llvm.assume(i1 %cond)
  %ret = icmp slt i32 %x, %y
  ret i1 %ret
}
